de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionMethodCall, IExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionNodeReader

    public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall
extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>
implements IExecutionMethodCall
    An implementation of IExecutionMethodCall which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

                         String name,

        Parameters:
        parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
        name - The name of this node.
        formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
        pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
